metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
The GEPA feedback metric is optimizer-facing only and does not replace gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scoring.
This capped validation config is a local Qwen latency-and-transfer probe, not a published Gan benchmark reproduction.
This probe intentionally raises max_tokens to 10000 for the local Qwen GEPA path so reflection truncation at 1024 does not decide the outcome in advance.
This is an explicit optimizer experiment for Qwen3.6:35b and should not be treated as the default local-Qwen workflow.
